# Q3 2025 Digital Trust Index: Account Takeovers in the Era of Agentic AI

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Account takeover (ATO) is one of the fastest-growing threats in 2025, with losses projected at $17B. Fraudsters are using AI-powered agents, bots, and fraud-as-a-service to scale attacks, while consumers remain exposed and wary.

Our Q3 2025 Digital Trust Index provides actionable insights on attack trends, generational risk, consumer behavior, and the rise of agentic AI, helping businesses safeguard revenue and maintain trust.

Read the report to learn:

*   Which industries saw the biggest spikes in ATO fraud 
*   Why 75% of consumers quit a brand after experiencing an ATO
*   The risks posed by agentic AI and fraud-as-a-service models
*   How businesses can adapt fraud defenses to protect both trust and revenue

### Read the Report
